title: Russell Hobbs Light & Easy Brights Berry Steam Iron, Fabric Softening Infused Ceramic Soleplate. 2x smoother glide, 2x durability, 240ml Water Tank, 115g Steam Shot, 35g Continuous Steam, 2400W, 26480
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Colourful Iron and Soleplate - One of our lightest iron ranges so it’s easy to manoeuvre and handle. Available in a range of bold colours to enhance and brighten your ironing experience.
Improved Soleplate Design - Designed with 50% smoother glide* for faster, non-stick ironing and made to be 2x more durable* for a longer working life.
Fabric Softener Infused Soleplate - Fabric Softener Infused soleplate conditions fabrics while it irons and helps defend against wrinkles.
Powerful Steam Output - Designed to deliver 115g steam shot and 35g of continuous steam to tackle those tough creases with ease.
2 Year Manufacturer's Guarantee - Plus 1 extra year when you register the product online.
description: From the manufacturer About The Brand Russell Hobbs was founded in the UK in 1952 by Bill Russell and Peter Hobbs, whose combined design and engineering flair allowed them to launch a company that remains a leading brand to this day. Over the years, Russell Hobbs has built up a legacy of design and innovation that placed the brand at the heart of the consumer’s home. The first automatic switch off kettle, the first automatic coffee maker and even the first plastic kettle were all Russell Hobbs Innovations. Russell Hobbs Light & Easy Brights, Berry - 26480 It’s Time to Make Ironing More Colourful The Light and Easy Brights Berry helps you power through the ironing with ease. Effort-saving features such as a 2x more durable* ceramic soleplate with 50% smoother glide* infused with fabric softener, and an Autosteam function to take the guesswork out of steam settings. It’s also designed to deliver 115g steam shot and 35g of continuous steam to tackle tough creases with ease. *vs Russell Hobbs Standard Ceramic Colourful Iron & Soleplate Improved Ceramic Soleplate – 50% smoother* glide -2x more durable* Fabric Softener Infused Coloured Ceramic Soleplate Anti-Calc Function Key Features Fabric Softener Infused Soleplate Fabric Softener Infused soleplate conditions fabrics while it irons and helps defend against wrinkles . Autosteam Technology Engineered to take the guesswork out of steam settings so you apply just the right amount of steam where you need it. The 35g continuous steam t ackles tricky creases with ease for faster ironing. 240ml Water Tank A generous-sized 240ml tank means you fill less frequently so you can power through the ironing a little bit faster. 115g Steam Shot A powerful shot of steam for the toughest wrinkles. Product Specifications Fabric Softener Infused Coloured Ceramic Soleplate Improved ceramic soleplate – 50% smoother* glide -2x more durable* Crease tackling power for faster ironing (115g steam shot, 35g continuous steam) Button groove soleplate design for harder to reach areas 115g steam shot & 35g continuous steam 240ml water tank Anti-drip & Anti-calc features 2m cord length *vs Russell Hobbs Standard Ceramic

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Clean the outside surfaces of the appliance with a damp cloth., Remove spots from the soleplate with a little vinegar, Unplug the iron, and sit it on its heel to cool.
specifications_table.Warranty description: ‎2 year manufacturer's guarantee - plus 1 extra year when you register the product online.
